name: Char Vale Vineyards
tagline: Family-grown estate Pinot Noir in Green Valley
seoDescription: Char Vale Vineyards: a family-owned estate winery in the Green Valley of Russian River Valley near Sebastopol, farming ten acres of award-winning estate Pinot

sections.heading: Family-grown estate Pinot Noir in Green Valley
sections.subheading: On ten contiguous acres in the Green Valley of the Russian River Valley near Sebastopol, the Char Vale family farms award-winning estate Pinot Noir, Rosé, Riesling, Chardonnay and Pinot Gris.
badges: Ten acres in Green Valley of the Russian River

items.title: Family-Owned & Farmed
items.body: Rooted right here in Sebastopol, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: Ten Acres In Green Valley Of The Russian River
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Award-Winning Estate Pinot Noir
items.body: Made with care and real ingredients — quality you can taste.

items.title: Estate Rosé, Riesling, Chardonnay & Pinot Gris
items.body: Made with care and real ingredients — quality you can taste.

items.title: Open Thursday–Monday, Near Sebastopol
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

sections.heading: About Char Vale
body: Char Vale Vineyards and Winery is a family-owned operation in the renowned Green Valley of the Russian River Valley, a mile west of Highway 116 near Sebastopol. The family farms ten contiguous acres of world-class grape varietals and makes the wine themselves, in small, estate-focused lots.

The result is a lineup built around award-winning estate Pinot Noir, alongside an estate Rosé of Pinot Noir, estate Riesling, single-vineyard Chardonnay and Pinot Gris. Visitors taste in a relaxed, welcoming setting on the estate, Thursday through Monday.
highlights: Ten acres in Green Valley of the Russian River Valley
Estate Rosé, Riesling, Chardonnay & Pinot Gris

items.title: Estate Tastings
items.description: Taste the current estate lineup at the winery, open 11am–4:30pm Thursday through Monday.

items.title: Estate Pinot Noir
items.description: Award-winning, estate-grown Pinot Noir from ten acres in the cool Green Valley appellation.

items.title: Estate Whites & Rosé
items.description: Estate Riesling, single-vineyard Chardonnay, Pinot Gris, and a Rosé of Pinot Noir.

items.title: Buy Online Or At The Winery
items.description: Limited-production wines are available at the winery, online, or by phone.

sections.heading: Hungry yet?
sections.body: Find us at 9280 Occidental Rd. Call (707) 827-6102 — we’re glad to help.
